title: Vegan Mexican Fajita Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful vegan stir fry inspired by Mexican cuisine. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and bell peppers and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Stir in the dried oregano and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice or cauliflower and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
